---
description: "Create a GitHub issue in the current repository."
---

Follow the workflow defined in `.claude/commands/gh-issue-push.md` in this
repository. Read that file and execute its steps exactly — it is the
canonical definition of the /gh-issue-push command; this prompt is a thin adapter
so the command stays single-sourced. Treat any text after the prompt
invocation as the command's arguments ($ARGUMENTS).
